name: Speed Ramp Edit
description: Turn your photo into 5 cinematic lifestyle poses built for viral speed-ramp reel editing — hero shot, walking motion, close-up, low-angle power, and motion turn + 4x upscale

default_prompts.pose_1_hero:
Use Image A as a high-fidelity facial reference for realistic likeness, accurate facial proportions, natural skin tone, authentic facial structure, realistic skin texture, detailed eyes, natural asymmetry, and seamless identity preservation while allowing photorealistic adaptation to different poses, outfits, and environments.

Generate a true photorealistic modern lifestyle portrait designed specifically for viral reel editing, cinematic motion transitions, speed ramps, zoom edits, rotational movement, shake effects, and browser-based auto-edit workflows.

IMPORTANT COMPOSITION RULES:
The subject MUST remain perfectly centered in the frame. Maintain balanced negative space around the subject for cinematic crop movement. Subject must occupy approximately 45-55% of frame height. Leave enough room for zoom-ins, rotations, shake effects, and motion blur transitions. Avoid tight edge cropping.

Scene: rooftop parking area, modern urban road, industrial outdoor environment, cinematic city atmosphere.

Body orientation: body turned 35-50 degrees away from camera, head turned slightly back toward lens, visible nose bridge silhouette, relaxed confident expression, natural posture.

Outfit: oversized plain black t-shirt, relaxed streetwear fit, dark casual pants, realistic clothing folds, subtle minimal accessories optional.

Camera: slightly low-angle perspective, 35mm cinematic lens look, handheld photography realism, shallow depth of field, HDR realism.

Lighting: natural daylight, soft golden-hour warmth, realistic contact shadows, accurate lighting direction, believable skin reflections.

Maintain: realistic pores, authentic hair strands, natural eye reflections, realistic skin texture, believable outdoor exposure.

STRICTLY AVOID: fantasy aesthetics, cinematic movie costumes, armor, cartoon styling, anime appearance, plastic AI skin, beauty filter look, exaggerated fashion editorials, front-facing passport pose.

This image is specifically optimized for: intro reveal, hero framing, cinematic zoom-ins, motion blur openings, rotational edits, speed-ramp transitions.
